description: TAM + recovery loss (convergence training). NO gradient-contrastive. Isolates recovery effect.
notes: Test hypothesis: training on recovered trajectory states improves convergence. Loss = L_mse(pos) + 0.1 * L_mse(rec). Baseline: q220 val_mse=0.009728±0.000016. Recovery loss weight λ=0.1, recovery_steps=1.
